# Qiniso

> Verified, trustworthy data tools for AI agents. Qiniso builds small, open-source MCP servers (and
> typed TypeScript libraries) that check the structured facts an AI agent emits — checksums, official
> codes, registry and government data — against authoritative sources. Verified answers, or an honest
> "not found", never a guess. Free, open source, no API key. "Qiniso" means "truth" in Zulu.

## Tools
- qiniso: 47 deterministic fact-checkers in one MCP server — IBAN, VAT, VIN, GTIN/UPC/EAN barcodes, national & tax IDs, crypto addresses, phone, dates, holidays. npm @qinisolabs/qiniso · hosted https://qiniso.qinisolabs.workers.dev/mcp
- bizdays: business-day & public-holiday calculations for 200+ countries. npm @qinisolabs/bizdays · hosted https://bizdays.qinisolabs.workers.dev/mcp
- icdwise: verified ICD-10-CM medical code lookup/validation/search (~74k codes). npm icdwise · hosted https://icdwise.qinisolabs.workers.dev/mcp
- floodwise: England flood-risk by postcode (Environment Agency, OGL). npm floodwise
- companieswise: UK company lookup over 5.7M Companies House records. npm companieswise
- sanctionwise: UK sanctions screening against the official FCDO UK Sanctions List (indicative). npm sanctionwise

## Model
Open core: tools free/open-source for adoption; the moat is curated, maintained, authoritative data kept current automatically. Built on the Model Context Protocol; each is also a plain TypeScript library.

## Links
- Website: https://qinisolabs.github.io/
- GitHub org: https://github.com/qinisolabs
- npm org: https://www.npmjs.com/org/qinisolabs
